message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Support vision models (image input) in OpenAI API chat completions",
+    "description": "Support vision models (image input) in OpenAI API chat completions. Requested by 22+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your ollama version and configuration:\n```bash\nollama --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working ollama installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ollama configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant ollama configuration:\n### What are you trying to do?\n\nI would like to use the Ollama implemented OpenAI chat completions API and [OpenAI python client](https://github.com/openai/openai-python) to ask question about images (e.g."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support vision models (image input) in OpenAI API chat…",
+        "description": "Supports passing in base64 encoded image into image_url.\n\nE.g.\n\n```\ncurl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\n    \"model\": \"llava\",\n    \"messages\": [\n      {\n        \"role\": \"user\",\n        \"content\": [\n          {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n\n```yaml\ncurl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\n    \"model\": \"llava\",\n    \"messages\": [\n      {\n        \"role\": \"user\",\n        \"content\": [\n          {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n            \"text\": \"What'\\''s in this image?\"\n          },\n          {\n            \"type\": \"image_url\",\n            \"image_url\": {\n              \"url\": \"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/dd/Gfp-wisconsin-madison-the-nature-boardwalk.jpg/2560px-Gfp-wisconsin-madison-the-nature-boardwalk.jpg\"\n            }\n          }\n        ]\n      }\n    ],\n    \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support vision models (image input) in OpenAI API chat…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Supports passing in base64 encoded image into image_url.\n\nE.g.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "curl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\n    \"model\": \"llava\",\n    \"messages\": [\n      {\n        \"role\": \"user\",\n        \"content\": [\n          {\n            \"type\": \"text\",\n            \"text\": \"What'\\''s in this image?\"\n          },\n          {\n            \"type\": \"image_url\",\n            \"image_url\": {\n              \"url\": \"https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/dd/Gfp-wisconsin-madison-the-nature-boardwalk.jpg/2560px-Gfp-wisconsin-madison-the-nature-boardwalk.jpg\"\n            }\n          }\n        ]\n      }\n    ],\n    \"max_tokens\": 300\n  }'",
+        "{\"error\":{\"message\":\"json: cannot unmarshal array into Go struct field Message.messages.content of type string\",\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\",\"param\":null,\"code\":null}}(env)",
+        "import ollama\nimport httpx\n\nresponse = httpx.get('https://cdn.arstechnica.net/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/GettyImages-90790890-800x533.jpg')\nresponse.raise_for_status()\nimage = response.content\nresponse = ollama.generate(model='llava', prompt='Describe this photo in detail.', images=[image], keep_alive=0)\nprint(response[\"response\"])"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
